title: Messaging Outcomes, Delivery Claims, and Evidence · Type Recall
summary: A delayed handoff reconstructs messaging outcomes, delivery claims, and evidence from bounded publish, route, delivery, acknowledgement, and recovery evidence, challenges one misconception, and revises the messaging outcome, delivery claim, and evidence charter. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for messaging outcome, delivery claim, and evidence charter after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and e…
objectives: Define producer, consumer, operator, security, accessibility, latency, loss, duplicate, and recovery evidence for one messaging outcome.
Distinguish commands, events, notifications, documents, and queries by ownership, audience, expected handling, and change semantics.
State at-most-once, at-least-once, effectively-once effect, ordering, and durability claims without promising impossible end-to-end exactly-once delivery.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: RabbitMQ and TypeScript Separate evidence from confidence · Review Transfer Evidence Plan
steps.instruction:
review case — A review messaging team handles case 3596 in a partner publisher using an unroutable changed topic key. Build deterministic TypeScript evidence to separate local publish, broker ownership, and observable stakeholder effect; allow exactly one terminal acknowledgement decision owner; then raise a broker resource alarm and stop new publisher admission. Browser code models pure messaging decisions only. amqplib, AMQP sockets, RabbitMQ, TLS, partitions, restarts, Docker, databases, external effects, load, upgrades, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Plan browser models, TypeScript compilation, contract tests, disposable RabbitMQ integration, partition, restart, load, and production transfer gates.

Inspect the Transfer Evidence Plan trace for this review case. Which record connects a precondition, observed state change, and boundary result?

Evidence target: RabbitMQ and TypeScript Separate evidence from confidence · Review Transfer Evidence Plan.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for plan browser models, typescript compilation, contract tests, disposable rabbitmq integration, partition, restart, load, and production transfer gates. For RabbitMQ and TypeScript Separate evidence from confidence · Review Transfer Evidence Plan, keep Transfer Evidence Plan connected to executable TypeScript messaging decision evidence.
